Operator notes

Conversation invariants

Critical product rules stay visible inside the user workspace.

  • Each conversation is pinned to one `agent_id`.
  • Changing agent means creating or cloning into a new chat.
  • Streaming text arrives over SSE and persists after completion.
  • Voice transcripts are projected back into the conversation timeline.

Operations

Monitoring and control

Jump to the platform surfaces you need while validating a chat flow.

Open Chat Pipeline dashboardOpen Admin cockpit
